rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type annexes using only visible output features and provided bounds.
generic_rules: Use explicit boolean helper declarations to encapsulate range conditions for clarity and type safety.
Ensure guarantee expressions reference only features directly visible at the component type scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Define range conditions as boolean equations: eq range_check : bool = feature >= min and feature <= max;
Guarantees must use equality to boolean helpers or direct boolean expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports or implementation-bound identifiers in component type annexes.
Avoid hardcoding literals without defining them as named constants or using provided bounds.
irrelevant_topics: assume, assign, validator, repair, fusion, model traceability, AADL implementation scope bindings
